scored_papers.title: $\xi R\phi^2$ non-minimal coupling, and the long range gravitational potential for different spin fields from 2-2 scattering amplitudes
scored_papers.abstract: In this paper we investigate the long range gravitational effect of curvature-scalar field non-minimal coupling, in the form of $\xi R \phi^2$, in the perturbative quantum gravity framework. Such coupling is most naturally motivated from the renormalisation of a scalar field theory with a quartic self interaction in a curved spacetime background.
scored_papers.reason: ξRφ² 非最小結合の長距離重力ポテンシャルを摂動 QG で解析🔥 Higgs inflation の非最小結合と直結、スピン依存性まで解明✨🌌
scored_papers.summary: 2→2 散乱振幅から ξRφ² 結合のスピン依存長距離重力ポテンシャルを系統的に導出💫 Higgs-重力非最小結合の量子補正を捕捉する新手法🔭

scored_papers.title: Cosmological collider signals of modular spontaneous CP breaking
scored_papers.abstract: We consider a modular-invariant extension of the Standard Model. Assuming that the modulus is the inflaton, the CP-violating phases of the Yukawa couplings evolve during inflation. This dynamics favours a Higgs condensate, so that Standard Model fermions mediate a one-loop cosmological collider signal enhanced by chemical potentials.
scored_papers.reason: モジュラー不変 SM でインフラトン＝モジュラス仮定→CP 位相変動が Higgs 凝縮を誘起☄️ 宇宙論コライダーと Higgs inflation の新結合🌌🎆
scored_papers.summary: SM フェルミオン1ループで宇宙論コライダー信号を計算💫 Higgs VEV がインフラトン場に依存して変動するダイナミクスを明示🌀
